MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John E. Jones, Esq., 673-0733, moving for withdrawal of attorney for plaintiff Troy L. Boyland

Ruling:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT granted PETITIONER TROY BOYLAND MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. Prevailing party to prepare an order to include the information about plaintiff's possible exposure to a motion to dismiss, sanctions, etc. (302/REQ) JUDGE RONALD E.
